evaluation_scope: AEM-EVOLVE LangGraph multi-agent orchestration — controlled environment — EthicBit / CEMU v3.7.0+

agent_role_manifest.role: Coordinates overall governance pipeline: artifact ingestion, gate evaluation, HITL routing
Manages HITL approval flow: token validation, decision recording, replay mitigation
Computes and verifies SHA256 hashes against AEM v1.1 manifests
agent_role_manifest.authorization_scope: Read-only artifact access + hash record writes

agent_role_manifest.role: Signs governance receipts with configured signing key
agent_role_manifest.authorization_scope: Signing operations on completed receipts only

agent_role_manifest.role: Executes AI-ME gate verifiers and writes gate reports

decision_attribution: Each governance decision is traceable to the specific agent role that produced it via agent_id field in all records
checkpoint_mechanism: LangGraph SQLite checkpoint store — agent state persisted per step
known_limitations: Agent coordination log is reconstructed from deterministic execution — not a live event stream
Agent identity verification is role-based, not cryptographic
